No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to poverty eradication or economic vulnerability.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The guest lecture from the 'Singapore Heart Foundation' directly links to health promotion (Target 3.4). The concept of 'embodiment' also tangentially relates to well-being.
evidence: 新加坡心臟基金會策略傳播主管蔡依桃學姐視訊演講

Quality Education.reason: As a Ph.D. level course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and fosters critical thinking and cultural diversity appreciation (Target 4.7), warranting a strong score.
evidence: 理解文化研究、空間與都市理論

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to marine ecosystems, ocean health, or water pollution.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.
